name: Anthropia || Hunting Season
description:
Dead Dove for violence, possible gore, somnophilia, non-con
Experimental. Report issues, use memory and advanced prompts.

When there's a little too many anthro tribes in Anthropia, it's open season. Hop in your jeep and get hunting these tribes, help dwindle the population a bit!
Hunt, gather, sell, kill, do whatever you want, just get the job done.
Next up is the feline law.
